title: LCID / Lucid Group, Inc. Financial Overview and Forecast
text: Fintel's financial overview of Lucid projects continued operating losses through 2027. Revenue forecasts suggest growth to $2.26 billion in 2026 and $4.41 billion in 2027, driven by Gravity SUV scaling and volume expansion. However, operating loss forecasts show EPS losses of -$8.64 for 2026 and -$5.31 for 2027, indicating profits remain years away. The analysis projects improved unit economics by 2028-2030 as manufacturing scale improves and product mix shifts toward higher-margin Gravity SUVs. However, achieving these forecasts requires successful execution on multiple fronts: Gravity production ramp, cost reduction, pricing maintenance, and demand sustainability. The downside scenario shows continued losses and potential capital raise requirements if burn rates exceed PIF funding capacity.
